company.name_jp: フォーディーネットワークス株式会社

research_notes: Researched on 2026-06-26. Company established April 2000. Capital: 30 million JPY. Located in Minato-ku, Tokyo. TEL: 03-5798-0012. Business: MFP solutions, drone services, 4D Pocket System. Officers: CEO 山本哲男, Auditor 森淳. Related company: Aerial Photo Service.
